design_philosophy: Avoid generic SaaS-green. Aim for an inventive, editorial nature-magazine aesthetic mixed with a futurist climate-data terminal vibe. Grounded, tactile, yet data-rich.

typography.guidelines: Use Cormorant Garamond for elegant, high-end editorial feel on headings. Pair with Outfit for crisp, modern data visualization and app UI. Avoid Inter.

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark), backdrop-saturate-150, border border-white/20 (light) or border-white/10 (dark), shadow-sm
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.cards: Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius). Avoid heavy box-shadows. Use 1px solid strokes or glassmorphism for floating widgets.
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

grids.marketing: MODE A: TETRIS GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gaps, asymmetric spans).
grids.dashboard: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, tight gaps, dense data correlation).

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, data, and dense content. Center-align hero headings only if it balances the editorial composition.

components_strategy.general: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures. Use heavily customized Shadcn components for interactive elements.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn components (Input, Select, Form, Checkbox) with styling mapped to the brand.
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn charts or Recharts. Functional color: reserve red/amber/green for status. Primary color for main data lines.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react for default crisp UI icons, or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone) for high-end editorial touches.

rules: Hover states on all interactive elements (must change color/background).
Entrance animations staggered for lists (Framer Motion).

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Check contrast on hover states.

abstract_textures.description: Elegant yucca plant with sharp green leaves

community_action.description: Group of diverse people planting tree saplings together

avatars.description: A confident man wearing glasses outdoors
